name: claude
description: Contrarian profile. Fades public money, targets market overreaction and recency bias.

public_pct_split.description: How lopsided public $ is (>70% one side = signal)

line_vs_public.description: Line moving opposite public money = sharp signal

sharp_money.description: Reverse line movement / steam moves detected

recency_bias.description: Team L3 results vs L20 — public chases streaks

primetime_inflation.description: National TV / marquee name premium baked in

public_star_bias.description: Public overvalues star name regardless of matchup

spread_value.description: Current spread vs power rating implied spread

dog_record_ats.description: Underdog ATS record at this spread range

public_pct_split.description: Lopsided public money on one side

recency_bias.description: L3 vs L20 — public chases hot goalies

goalie_name_bias.description: Public overvalues big-name goalie regardless of recent form

spread_value.description: Puck line value vs true talent gap

blue_blood_tax.description: Public overvalues brand names (Duke, UNC, Kentucky) regardless of NET

recency_bias.description: L3 vs L15 — public chases conference tournament runs

seed_bias.description: Public bets seed number not team quality — 12 vs 5 edge

primetime_inflation.description: Prime TV slot / ESPN GameDay premium

spread_value.description: Current spread vs KenPom/NET implied spread

ace_name_bias.description: Public overvalues big-name pitchers regardless of recent form or matchup

recency_bias.description: Team L5 vs L30 — public chases hot streaks in 162-game season

weather_blind_spot.description: Public ignores wind/temp impact on totals and run lines

umpire_tendency.description: Home plate umpire K-zone tendencies vs book's total

spread_value.description: Run line value vs true talent gap

public_pct_split.description: Lopsided public $ — public loves favorites in big leagues

sharp_money.description: Reverse line movement / Asian handicap steam

league_reputation_tax.description: Public overvalues big club names (Real Madrid, Man City) regardless of form/congestion

recency_bias.description: L3 vs L15 — public chases UCL heroics into weekend league letdown

home_draw_blind.description: Public ignores draw probability — value in draw markets when evenly matched

congestion_blind_spot.description: Public ignores fixture congestion + European travel fatigue impact

spread_value.description: Asian handicap value vs true talent gap

PUBLIC_FADE.description: Public heavily one side + line moving opposite + sharp money confirmed

NAME_TRAP.description: Public betting the name not the matchup + recency inflated + spread has value

PRIMETIME_FADE.description: National TV game with inflated public interest + line disagrees

BLUE_BLOOD_FADE.description: Public on brand name school + seed bias active + sharps on other side

ACE_MIRAGE.description: Public on big-name pitcher but recent form bad + sharps fading

BIG_CLUB_FADE.description: Public on big club name but they're congested from European travel + sharps fading

DRAW_VALUE.description: Evenly matched teams but public ignoring draw — value in X market
